en: A: How did you get here?
I came on foot.
A: What kind of car did you take?
B: I came by bus.
A: How do you go to church?

ab: Ma’ungting ca tama naak laihlih mama’ zakun maipata.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.
A: How does he usually go to school?
B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Makua ca qudasnau’az suu maipata mabaliv is sanglav.
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Tunlaihlihpukpuk a cia maipata mabaliv is sanglav.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.
A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?
B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.
A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Tundaza’ a cia kusbabai maipa langi.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: Ma’az tu laihlih tundaza’an a cia maipa takau?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?
B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?
B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Nii, tundaza’ a cia kusbabai maipa taitu’.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Maiza ca ulu’anlaihlih haan machuan is mangki?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Maiza, maipa’a tantangaus aiza na saduu asu ulu’anlaihlih.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Ica ca mantan machuan a ulu’an laihlihtingki’?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Uka ha’anti ulu’an laihlihtingki’, mu’az asu maqtu tunlaihlihkulapha.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Talpia tatnulan ca daiza’an laihlihqaungu kaca’an sipulan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Macan qan hima’ kinilutan na kaca’anin sipulan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Piia tatnulan ca daiza’an is laihlihtukhiv kaca’an taiciu’?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?
B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Talbuntu’ ca ma’unting i laihlih munca’an ulaii?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?
B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Piia tatnulan ca daiza’an suu laihlihtingki’ munca’an i lumaq naak?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?
B: It takes 20 minutes.
A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?
B: I can ride a bicycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I have a motorcycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I don't have a motorcycle.
